company.name: MMOCCUL
company.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development
company.tagline: Your financial partner for growth and success
company.awards: Fastest-Growing and Digital Friendly Credit Union Cooperative in Cameroon (past 4 years)
company.description: MMOCCUL is a member-owned and managed financial union dedicated to mobilizing savings and providing loans to its members at low interest rates. Membership is open to everyone.

requirements: Provide a current National Identity Card or Passport
Pay building reserve fee of 8,500 FCFA
Purchase shares worth 30,000 FCFA (reimbursable with six-month advance application)
benefits: Save and withdraw money whenever needed, from the comfort of your home
Easy access to loans at good conditions with low interest rates
Facilities to open accounts for specific purposes
High annual interest rate on your savings
Free interbranch money transfer and withdrawal from any branch

savingAccount.name: Saving Account
savingAccount.description: Your capital and reserves for unforeseen circumstances and future investments. Yields very high interests at the end of the year.

depositAccount.name: Deposit Account
depositAccount.description: Serves as a current account where money is deposited and withdrawn at will for your daily transactions.

studentAccount.name: Student Account
studentAccount.description: Special account designed for students to manage their finances efficiently.

dailySavingAccount.name: Daily Saving Account
dailySavingAccount.description: Encourages regular daily savings with attractive returns.

minorAccount.name: Minor Account
minorAccount.description: Account for members under the age of 18. Parents and guardians can create accounts for their children.

groupAccount.name: Group Account
groupAccount.description: Account for groups and associations to manage collective finances.

loans.description: We offer diverse loans that serve your project needs with flexible terms and low interest rates

types.name: School Fee Loans
types.description: Financing for education expenses to ensure your children's academic success

types.name: Container Removal Loans
types.description: Loans for importing goods and managing container logistics

types.name: Project Financing
types.description: Comprehensive financing for business and personal projects

types.name: Njangui Financing
types.description: Loans to support traditional savings groups and community financing

types.name: Plot Financing
types.description: Loans for land acquisition and property development

types.name: Overdraft
types.description: Short-term credit facility for immediate cash needs

types.name: Agropastoral Financing
types.description: Specialized loans for agricultural and livestock projects

loans.salaryPayment: We pay Civil Servants and Private Workers. Those whose salaries are paid through MMOCCUL obtain loans with very favorable conditions.

moneyTransfer.name: Money Transfer Services
moneyTransfer.description: Instant money transfer services available to members and non-members worldwide

atmVisa.name: ATM VISA Card Services
atmVisa.description: Access your funds anytime, anywhere with our ATM VISA cards

internationalSupport.message: For members and customers outside Cameroon, please visit our online platform for services and support
